criteria.description: TestGCUnderConcurrency doc comment no longer claims equivalence to TestNewSnapshotClosesEpochAcquireVersionReadRace's specific TOCTOU
criteria.evidence: gc_test.go lines ~522-540 (current): 'This is NOT a substitute for, nor equivalent to, ... TestNewSnapshotClosesEpochAcquireVersionReadRace ... COMPLEMENTS the deterministic regression test above but does not replace it' — introduced by commit a1f220d

criteria.description: Doc comment reworded to state it is a complementary broad-stress test for general premature-reclaim bugs
criteria.evidence: gc_test.go: 'a broad, general-purpose concurrency stress test ... intended to catch gross premature-reclaim bugs (e.g. an epoch never being acquired at all, refcounting corruption under load, off-by-one epoch comparisons)'

criteria.description: Reader-goroutine overlap widened to loop on shared stop channel instead of fixed round count
criteria.evidence: gc_test.go reader loop (~lines 651-710): unbounded for{select{case <-stop: ...}} loop, readerActive span tracking, minAcceptableOverlapFraction=0.5 assertion at end of test
go test ./engine/mvcc/... -race -v -count=2 -> PASS for TestGCUnderConcurrency both iterations (1.83s, 1.77s), full package PASS in 79.024s
